page_title: TouchFlow Pro | Learn Touch Typing & Increase WPM
audience: Professional typists, developers, and students aiming for elite performance.

detected_sections.section_name: Learn Touch Typing. Increase Typing Speed (WPM).

issues.problem: Vague technical terminology like 'fatigue detection' lacks depth.
issues.why_it_matters: Skeptical professionals need proof of value before committing.
issues.what_to_add: Technical breakdown of fatigue metrics (e.g., burst-to-drift ratio).
issues.example_fix: Our engine monitors your 'burst-to-drift' ratio—the micro-seconds between keystrokes—to detect cognitive fatigue before your error rate spikes.

issues.problem: Missing author credentials or expert bio.
issues.why_it_matters: E-E-A-T score relies heavily on clear expertise and authority signals.
issues.what_to_add: A 'Meet the Team' or 'Designed by Experts' section.
issues.example_fix: Designed by [Name], a Lead Software Engineer who reached a consistent 120 WPM through neuro-efficiency training.

issues.problem: Static visuals could be more interactive.
issues.why_it_matters: Drives higher dwell time and demonstrates the product better.
issues.what_to_add: GIFs or interactive UI demos of the dashboard.
issues.example_fix: [GIF showing live speed chart and bottleneck detection]

issues.why_it_matters: B2B customers need clear security and reporting details.
issues.what_to_add: List SSO support, team analytics, and HIPAA compliance.
issues.example_fix: Enterprise includes HIPAA-compliant data handling, Team Performance Dashboards, and custom training modules.

issues.problem: Meta description lacks a hook for the baseline test.
issues.why_it_matters: Higher CTR leads to more entry-level users.
issues.example_fix: Reach 100+ WPM. Start your free baseline test in 60 seconds.

metadata.current_title: TouchFlow Pro | Learn Touch Typing & Increase WPM
metadata.recommended_title: TouchFlow Pro: Elite Typing Training for Professionals
metadata.current_meta_description: Engineered for excellence. Learn touch typing and increase your WPM with professional analytics.
metadata.recommended_meta_description: Master touch typing and reach 100+ WPM. Use professional analytics and fatigue detection. Start your free baseline test in 60 seconds!

high_priority.fix: Implement an Author/Expert section with specific credentials and background.

medium_priority.fix: Detail the 'Fatigue Detection' logic and show actual dashboard screenshots.

low_priority.fix: Add 'Free Baseline Test' hook to the meta description to boost CTR.

spreadsheet_rows.recommendations: Add Author/Expert bio section with specific WPM/Dev credentials.
Expand technical explanation of fatigue detection and performance hooks.
Detail Enterprise features (SSO, Security, Compliance) for B2B trust.
Add interactive UI demos or GIF walkthroughs of the dashboard.
Rewrite meta description to include 'Free Baseline Test' CTA.
